revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia categories
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:05:50
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1869年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1869]] [[azb:Category:۱۸۶۹-جو ایلده ژاپون]] [[az:Category:1869-cu ildə Yaponiya]] [[commons:Category:1869 in Japan]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1869]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۸۶۹ (میلادی)]] [[hy:Category:1869 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1869]] [[ko:Category:1869년 일본]] [[pt:Category:1869 no Japão]] [[simple:Category:1869 in Japan]] [[sv:Category:1869 i Japan]] [[tr:Category:1869'da Japonya]] [[uk:Category:1869 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں 1869ء]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1869 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1869年日本]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:箱館戦争]].

Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="

Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6796992)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Year in country category|Japan|Asia|}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6796992}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1869 in Japan]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Meiji era]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1869_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
